mapper.select: SELECT * FROM merchant ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant(name, contact_name, contact_phone, address, remark, status, deleted, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{name}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{address}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{deleted}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant SET name = #{name}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, address = #{address}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status}, deleted = #{deleted}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM merchant
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR contact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR contact_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id DESC
